raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX, I placed an order with XXXX through the XXXX XXXX XXXX. Almost instantly, I realized I had not changed the delivery address in the app to the correct one and the food order would not be delivered to me because the XXXX location was too far away. I canceled the order and asked XXXX XXXX  for a refund, which XXXX XXXX refused to issue. I disputed the charge with my credit card issuer, Citibank. They found in XXXX XXXX XXXX favor on XX/XX/XXXX. I never received the food and I do not think I should have to pay for something I did not receive, especially when I acted promptly to cancel.
